basic_details.job_title: DSWO Etawah Subject Specialist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 21 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Social Welfare Officer, Etawah (DSWO Etawah)
basic_details.short_information: District Social Welfare Officer, Etawah (DSWO Etawah) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 21 Subject Specialist (Guest Faculty) Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: University/College teacher or UPSC main exam qualified or PCS interview qualified or 3 years teaching experience in reputed coaching institute, M.Sc First Class in relevant subject with 3 years teaching experience in reputed coaching institute
qualification.details: Indian Polity and Governance, Geography, History, Indian Economy, UPPSC Paper 5 and 6, CSAT, CSAT (Mathematics and Reasoning), Ethics, Current Affairs, Environment and Disaster Management, Science and Technology: University/College teacher or UPSC main exam qualified or PCS interview qualified or 3 years teaching experience in reputed coaching institute. Zoology, Botany, Physics, Chemistry: M.Sc First Class in relevant subject with 3 years teaching experience in reputed coaching institute.

salary_details.details: Rs. 2000 Per Lecture Rs. 2000/- per lecture (90 minutes)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: Etawahh.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
